creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
Hi all. I'm revisiting my old pr's.

I can't say anything about audio/aureal-kmod. It uses prehistoric binary 
blob with unknown origin and license. I can mirror distfile if that's 
the matter. I see no problems in mirroring distfile on 
MASTER_SITE_BACKUP as binary blob is extra old and the company that 
created this device vanishes a long time ago.

misc/zoneinfo overwrites system files and directories so it can be maid 
free of NO_PACKAGE but that stands for another pr.

www/srilm is absent as for today.

Is there any other objections or we can close this pr?

-- 
Sphinx of black quartz judge my vow.
